title: M3 cross-section: equity universe run (OQ1 decided: ~35 t0-selected large-caps + ETF control)
source: 2026-07-03 deep project review (alpha-readiness audit); gaps previously lived only in spec prose
why: The single biggest blocker to a credible equity-alpha claim. Everything to date is the NVDA n=1 plumbing smoke test (B0001); spec Milestone 1 says an edge is believed only if it shows up broadly across names. Requires: universe list file, batch ingestion (fetch_equity_daily.py is one-ticker-per-invocation), registering tickers in phase5/asset_registry.py, a pooled equity config wired to pooled_walk_forward.py, and an M3 plan doc. OQ1 (universe definition) decided 2026-07-03 — see recommendation + history.
value_rationale: Gates every downstream alpha claim; without breadth the project cannot meet its own evidence bar.
scope: Freeze selection rule ex-ante: ~35 largest/most-liquid US large-caps selected on t0 (~2006) information (e.g. top 35 by 2006 market cap/ADV with full history), NOT current index membership; enumerate excluded 2006-era delistees in the plan doc
Batch fetch + registry: ingest universe OHLCV via equity_source, register tickers + regime dossiers
Pooled equity config (configs/) wired to cross_asset.py + pooled_walk_forward.py; --dry-run first
Parallel control run: 9 long-history SPDR sector ETFs (survivorship-clean, low breadth) with ex-ante interpretation rule recorded in the plan
Report long/short metrics separately; M3 claim is strictly 'meta adds value over primary within this universe', never absolute Sharpe/PSR
Write M3 plan doc under docs/superpowers/plans/ before implementation
recommendation: OQ1 decision (2026-07-03, quant-phd-advisor consult, reversible): Option B modified — t0-selected (~2006) liquid large-cap basket of ~35 names, with sector ETFs as parallel survivorship-clean control group. Rationale: survivorship bias concentrates in small/distressed names and in t_end selection (Shumway JF 1997; LdP 2015 seminar defines the sin as composing the universe on a later date); t0 selection bounds the residual to a short, enumerable, mostly-M&A delistee list (~1-2pp/yr anchor for large caps). ETFs alone fail as primary test: ~3-4 effective independent bets (Grinold breadth), idiosyncratic dispersion averaged away, flat 10bps punitive vs their real costs. Current S&P 100 (A) deferred to the point-in-time vendor swap (B0004) — it is the textbook t_end sin. Validate event density with a 5-ticker --dry-run before freezing universe size; if primaries fire <~3 events/yr/name, broaden toward A despite the bias.
out_of_scope: Point-in-time membership (B0004); per-ticker friction (B0005); cross-sectional features (B0006); sizing/portfolio construction.

history.reason: OQ1 decided (delegated by user, quant-phd-advisor consulted, explicitly reversible): universe = ~35 t0-selected (~2006) liquid US large-caps + 9 SPDR sector ETFs as survivorship-clean control; current-members S&P 100 deferred to PIT vendor (B0004). Caveats recorded: (1) asymmetric bias — report long/short separately, within-universe relative claims only, no absolute-Sharpe promotion until PIT re-run; (2) universe swaps count as trials — increment DSR trial count if re-run on a different basket after a fail; (3) bias-meta interaction unmeasured until PIT — check MDA for trend/recovery-feature domination, ETF control is the canary.

M3 implementation plan written: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-03-equity-m3-cross-section.md (8 tasks: universe file+loader, batch fetch, registry+pooled constants, pooled D1 runner+configs, long/short reporter, data ingestion+density gate, full runs+honest readout, regime dossiers). Reuses run_multi_h4._run_one_pool for Phases B/C/D; additive-only changes to H4 path.

Task 3 (registry + pooled constants) revealed a pre-existing test conflict: tests/phase5/test_asset_registry.py::test_keys_are_full_tickers_and_match_id asserts 4<=len(ticker)<=6 (tightened in commit 7fdd879, Task 8 review). The frozen M3 universe (configs/universe_equity_m3.yaml) legitimately contains 1-3 char NYSE tickers (T, C, GE, MO) plus 3-char XOM. Registering the universe in ASSET_REGISTRY per Task 3 brief now fails that test — full uv run pytest -q shows 1 failure, though the brief Step 5 subset (new tests + H4-parity guard: test_run_multi_h4_aggregation/planning, test_pooled_walk_forward) all pass as specified. NOT fixed in Task 3 (out of scope per brief file list); needs a follow-up to loosen/relax the length guard (e.g. 1<=len<=6) or special-case equity tickers before Task 3 work is considered fully green.
